headline: Anthropic secures major data center deal amid rapid capability expansion
body: Anthropic has entered a significant data center partnership, according to multiple sources tracking the infrastructure move. This development signals the company's commitment to scaling compute resources for larger model training and deployment. For healthcare AI implementations, infrastructure stability directly impacts model performance in clinical settings where downtime affects patient workflows. The move reflects broader vendor consolidation trends in the AI stack that healthcare organizations must monitor when evaluating long-term partnerships for EHR integration and clinical decision support systems.
